; Fixture phase 1. Do not add a launch action before hardware confirmation.
; Chiappa/Ferrari Sidebar fixture SHA-256: 06bf4c2777d5d4b15297f0d6370fb0352c2ca38098d440d7b7bd405a5384e793
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[5882927607508357618]]#[[7709552963638993992]]
        INSERT {
            ~&5882927607508357618&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: lettersHomeLauncher
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "letters-home-launcher"
                ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Letters Home")
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/letters-home/icons/letter"
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.preferredHeight: ~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&11921478716705041271&~: ~&233744436321411&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {}
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
